title: Gothic Magic & Mages' Staffs
description: "Gothic Magic & Mages' Staffs" is a texture pack that transforms the wands from the "Electroblob's Wizardry" mod into custom staff models inspired by the Gothic series.
body:
Uwaga!
Paczka wymaga do działania moda "Electroblob's Wizardry"!

 

"Gothic Magic & Mages' Staffs" to paczka tekstur do Minecrafta, która przekształca różdżki z moda "Electroblob's Wizardry" w unikalne modele kosturów inspirowane serią Gothic. Dodatkowo, zmienione zostały ubrania czarodziejów na te, które są znane z Gothica jako szaty magów.

Teraz możesz poczuć się jak prawdziwy mag ognia lub wody w świecie Minecrafta!

 

Translated:

 

Note!
The package requires "Electroblob's Wizardry" mod to work!

 

"Gothic Magic & Mages' Staffs" is a Minecraft texture pack that transforms the wands from the "Electroblob's Wizardry" mod into custom staff models inspired by the Gothic series. Additionally, the pack changes the robes of the wizards to those familiar from Gothic mages. Now you can experience playing as a fire or water mage in the world of Minecraft!

 

Credits for Electroblob's team:

Electroblob's Wizardry

A modification for Minecraft by Mojang AB

Designed, coded and textured by Electroblob

Thanks to Minecraft Forge and MCP, without which this mod would not have been possible.

Thanks also to the Minecraft modding community, which always has an answer to my modding problems!

In addition, I'd like to thank the following individuals for their contributions to the mod:
